#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --account=rrg-bengioy-ad
#SBATCH --ntasks=1
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=8
#SBATCH --gres=gpu:h100_3g.40gb:1


#SBATCH --mem=48G
#SBATCH --time=3:59:59
#SBATCH --job-name=gb-qwen35-08b-markovze-minigrid
#SBATCH --output=/scratch/rogercc/glyphbench_runs/logs/slurm-gb-qwen35-08b-markovze-minigrid-%j.out
#SBATCH --error=/scratch/rogercc/glyphbench_runs/logs/slurm-gb-qwen35-08b-markovze-minigrid-%j.err

module load apptainer

export TORCHINDUCTOR_CACHE_DIR="$SLURM_TMPDIR/torch_cache"
export VLLM_COMPILE_CACHE_DIR="$SLURM_TMPDIR/vllm_compile_cache"
export PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
export HF_HOME=/scratch/rogercc/hf_cache
export TRANSFORMERS_CACHE=/scratch/rogercc/hf_cache
export HUGGINGFACE_HUB_CACHE=/scratch/rogercc/hf_cache

echo "=== GlyphBench Eval: $SLURM_JOB_ID on $SLURM_NODELIST ==="
echo "Model: Qwen/Qwen3.5-0.8B | Harness: markov_zeroshot | Suite: minigrid | Started: $(date)"

SIF=/scratch/rogercc/images/glyphbench.sif

mkdir -p /scratch/rogercc/glyphbench_runs

apptainer exec --nv \
    --bind /scratch/rogercc/glyphbench:/src \
    --bind /scratch/rogercc/glyphbench_runs:/results \
    --bind /scratch/rogercc/hf_cache:/hf_cache \
    --env HF_HOME=/hf_cache \
    --env TRANSFORMERS_CACHE=/hf_cache/hub \
    --env HUGGINGFACE_HUB_CACHE=/hf_cache/hub \
    --env HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 \
    --env TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=1 \
    --env VLLM_NO_USAGE_STATS=1 \
    --env TORCHINDUCTOR_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/torch_cache \
    --env VLLM_COMPILE_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/vllm_compile_cache \
    --env PYTHONPATH=/src/src \
    --env CUDA_MODULE_LOADING=LAZY \
    --env CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 \
    --env PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \
    --env VLLM_WORKER_MULTIPROC_METHOD=spawn \
    --workdir /src \
    $SIF \
    python3 /src/eval/run_eval.py \
        --model Qwen/Qwen3.5-0.8B \
        --harness markov_zeroshot \
        --history-len 5 \
        --episodes 10 \
        --max-turns 200 \
        --batch-size 10 \
        --max-new-tokens 16384 \
        --max-model-len 32768 \
        --gpu-memory-utilization 0.9 \
        --enforce-eager \
        --dtype bfloat16 \
        --temperature 0.7 \
        --tensor-parallel-size 1 \
        --suites minigrid \
        --output /results/

_exit=$?
echo "=== Finished: $(date), exit=$_exit ==="
exit $_exit
